This item is a deferred, subscription, or recurring purchase. By continuing, I agree to the cancellation policy and authorize you to charge my payment method at the prices, frequency and dates listed on this page until my order is fulfilled or I cancel, if permitted.

Knitted Zip Hoodie - Dark Moss Green - XS is backordered and will ship as soon as it is back in stock.

Pickup available at Unrecorded Store Nº1

Usually ready in 24 hours

Our Knitted Zip Hoodie is designed for a boxy fit and knitted from Organic Cotton. The design features a ribbed collar hood, dropped shoulders and a silver YKK zipper.

William is 1,88m and wearing a size L.

If you are in between sizes, go one size up. 

- 100% Organic Cotton.
- Made in Portugal. 

Materials & Care

Our cotton is grown on soil that is free of toxic pesticides and fertilizers. Our fabric is dyed and finished without the use of heavy metals or allergenic disperse dyes.

- Wash at 30 degrees with similar colours
- Lay flat to dry
- Iron on the inside if necessary
Shipping & Returns

- To DE/FR/BE/LU/AT/DK/UK €9 (free above €100)
- To rest of EU €15 (free above €150)
- To rest of Europe €25 (free above €200)
- To rest of World €35 (free above €300)

Salt Yard has a 14-day return policy: any unwanted items needs to be shipped within 14 days of receipt. After the product is returned you will be refunded.Salt Yard will issue a full refund including the original shipping cost. The return shipping fee will not be refunded.

Our fabrics are developed specifically for us and we only produce quality apparel that lasts.

Lambswool Cardigan

Wool is a sustainable, renewable and biodegradable natural fibre, with some great performance characteristics. It also provides and retains warmth while being naturally flame retardant. We believe that wool is hard to beat.

Drawstring Trousers

This cotton is grown on soil that is free of toxic pesticides and fertilizers. The fabric is dyed and finished without the use of heavy metals or allergenic disperse dyes.

Sustainability

We only work with suppliers who take social and environmental standards seriously. They continuously look to exceed industry standards. We can vouch for the factories we use because we frequently visit them ourselves.

Read more
ESSENTIALS

Premium quality

We make premium quality apparel that can be worn all year round. We don’t design seasonal collections, instead we add new permanent items to our range. We pay attention to details and take care over what fabrics we use. Our range is composed of finely crafted, timeless unisex garments and accessories.

Shop collection

We use 100% GOTS certified organic cotton.

Nothing is wasted.
